description_long: This is a vintage DIAPREX slide projector, featuring a robust rectangular body with a matte light gray finish and black base. The front houses a prominent circular lens assembly, surrounded by a textured black ring, and the brand name 'DIAPREX' is clearly printed on the front panel. On one side, there is a metallic slide tray with a handle for manual slide insertion and removal, and a visible slot for loading slides. The top of the projector has a rectangular cutout, likely for ventilation or lamp access, and the rear section includes a large, ribbed black knob, possibly for focusing. Several warning and information labels are affixed to the side, and a thick power cable extends from the back. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws and functional components, typical of mid-to-late 20th-century office or educational equipment.
description: A vintage DIAPREX slide projector with a large circular lens, metallic slide tray, and a sturdy rectangular body in light gray and black, featuring visible labels and a prominent power cable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slide tray extended and the main body split into two sections, with the lens not visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slide tray, top cutout, warning labels, and the power cable at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid back panel, the separation between the two main body sections, and the absence of visible controls.
description_view_3: Front view with the DIAPREX logo, large circular lens, and the metallic slide tray with handle clearly visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The DIAPREX brand logo is visible on the front left panel, printed in white uppercase letters on a black background, accompanied by a small circular emblem.
attribute_lens_type: fixed lens, large circular shape with a textured adjustment ring, likely for manual focus.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel consists of a few physical buttons and switches located on the side near the warning labels, with clear labeling and a red power switch.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Ventilation is provided by a large ribbed black knob on the rear left side, likely serving as a vented cover for the internal fan or lamp compartment.
